scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @codex-sidepanel/shared && npm run build --workspace @codex-sidepanel/bridge && npm run build --workspace @codex-sidepanel/native-host && npm run build --workspace @codex-sidepanel/extension
scripts.test: npm run prepare:workspace && npm run test --workspace @codex-sidepanel/shared && npm run test --workspace @codex-sidepanel/bridge && npm run test --workspace @codex-sidepanel/native-host && npm run test --workspace @codex-sidepanel/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run prepare:workspace && npm run typecheck --workspace @codex-sidepanel/bridge && npm run typecheck --workspace @codex-sidepanel/native-host && npm run typecheck --workspace @codex-sidepanel/extension
